summary: Kimi Antonelli seizes control at Spa with pole position ahead of Max Verstappen, signaling Mercedes' resurgence as the championship battle intensifies heading into the summer break. Lando Norris faces an uphill climb from tenth on the grid after a 10-place penalty, potentially handing crucial points to rivals while Lewis Hamilton's recent Ferrari momentum builds pressure on the Scuderia to capitalize. A decisive result here could reshape the title fight's trajectory, with Norris's penalty creating an unexpected opportunity for contenders to close the gap before the calendar's halfway mark.
